task.title: US-001: HMM Core Engine with Forward Algorithm (No Look-Ahead)
task.description: Implement shared/core/hmm/hmm_engine.py with GaussianHMM, BIC model selection, and FORWARD ALGORITHM (filtered inference, not Viterbi) to prevent look-ahead bias. Key methods: train() with model selection, predict_filtered() using forward algorithm only, regime info extraction. This is the most critical component.
